result: Validation complete. One minor omission found: the knowledge file lacks the user benefit explanation that appears in the source document, which describes how this feature improves usability by letting users see if functionality is available before attempting to use it.

findings.description: The knowledge file omits the user benefit statement explaining why this feature improves usability. The source states: 'ユーザが実際にボタン/リンクを選択する前に該当機能が使用可能かどうかが分かるため、ユーザビリティの向上につながる。' (Users can understand if functionality is available before clicking, which improves usability). While the complete technical documentation of how to use the feature is present, this contextual explanation of the feature's value is missing.
findings.source_evidence: Source RST lines 2-4: 'これにより、ユーザが実際にボタン/リンクを選択する前に該当機能が使用可能かどうかが分かるため、ユーザビリティの向上につながる。'
